commits.author: Christopher Howlett
lines: Renamed the enum flag function

commits.author: lghassen
lines: Fix discontinuity artifacts in "stitching" between volumetric and 2d ring shaders
Fix a source of aliasing on the edge of the 2d ring shader from grazing angles
Fix artifacts/edges on boundaries of ring shadows on planet surface visible on AMD GPUs
Fix white band on the inner edge of Saturn ring texture
Unlink unrelated clouds setting and terrain shadows setting

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed hidden cursor will cause rollover behavior on windows inheriting from ImGuiWindow. Now will not activate this behavior, and the window will still activate autohide actions.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Imported IVA Assets and added them to the default craft. Next up will be a camera mode for it but you can freecam into it for now.

commits.author: lghassen
lines: Fix shadow far plane being interpreted as a shadow in volumetric exhausts

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Eliminated time since periapsis conversions when getting state vectors which could introduce unnecessary time precision issues.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed a case where time advancement in the physics loop could be very slightly off.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added size adapters to Core Fairing A Assets.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Made the IVA 'Part' non-spawnable in the debug editor.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added RaytracingRenderer.cs. Currently this file is not used, and is just a placeholder.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added initial setup for differentiating if a part model is used for raytracing when it is enabled. Using the comment tag 'IVARAYTRACE' to coordinate todos about the work.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added support for handling multiple game data declarations for a part.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added Generator part component.
Added Generator Update into the worker task updates.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Fixed Battery component construction.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added display of battery information and generator information to part context windows.
Display electrical charge in Wh and KWh in the UI.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added very early IVA Controller work. Can be switched to via shift-c.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Moved part raytracing check to a spot that should cause less complications down the line. No user facing changes.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added some quick mouse smoothing to the IVA camera/controller.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: The IVA camera/controller now accounts for the ship's rotations.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed hover actions for ImGuiWindow base was being validated for any open window element, causing confusing autohide behavior. Now targeted to only child elements, using ImGuiHoveredFlags.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: IVA Controller now respects mouse look setting.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Turned off the emissive map for the command module.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Scaled the light part down to 0.3x size.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed capsule emissive was using a gradient and was a 2k texture. Reduced the size to 256 and removed gradients.
Added multiply on standard mesh emissive. This allows the global bloom to pickup emissive values at max texture setting.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed spot light part emissive texture was 4k when should have been 256, and was not normalized to emissive values.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Migrated Earth Ocean Color texture from DDS to KTX2 and BC1, to reduce texture size and VRAM usage.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed T_LightPack textures were all 4k textures. Reduced sizes for PBR related textures to required values, reducing VRAM and disk space use.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Allow multiple battery components on a Part.
Add display of Ws Wh and KWh for charge display in UI.
Allow multiple generator components on a part.
Add PowerConsumer part component functionality.
Add ability for a PowerConsumer to be a lightswitch.
Add processing of PowerConsumer components to worker tasks.
